series.curator_notes: The series exists in two versions: classic (2012) and CGI (2015-2016). The CGI versions are more recent and are kept. Episodes 1-12 were re-released as CGI versions; episodes 13-15 only exist in the classic format. Episode numbering follows the format 'NN/Title' with optional '(CGI)' suffix.
